user_query: My friend is new to cryptocurrency and wants to learn more about Bitcoin. Can you recommend some articles with sentiment analysis and keyword extraction? Also, provide the latest tweets about Bitcoin in the last 12 hours with sentiment analysis and hashtags.

TaskList.description: Collect articles related to Bitcoin for learning purposes.
Perform sentiment analysis and keyword extraction on the collected articles.
Fetch the latest tweets about Bitcoin from the last 12 hours.
Analyze the sentiment of the fetched tweets and extract relevant hashtags.
